name: Island of Mezaai
description:
On a far away island, lays Mezaai. A land populated by wolves. The clans split into the cavern dwellers, Calyxe, the dessert pack, Eremis, and Silvum, which is just some wolves sitting refined in the woods. Every clan has their own ways, but most certainly each has a Vanquisher.

Eremis is famous for their trading market, exciting dances, festivities and rugged inhabitants.

Calyxe is known for living in the amethyst mounds under the mountains. They recognize by beauty, smarts, and divinity.

Silvum, being more down-to-earth type wolves, grow and thrive their own foods and education system.



Vanquishers are wolves trained for special combat with swords. These certain blades, made by Dark Forgemaster's, can pierce and kill Dark Ones. Dark Ones, wolves with fire spitting and blood dieted powers, are distinct to tell from a normal canine. Their eyes are shades of red, bare red markings or sometimes wings, and feast on other wolves souls. They come from a dark ruthless realm blocked by the islands heart gate. This gate though grows unstable during the fall season.
creator: Sol_Offline
